request_id.description: Unique identifier for this feature request

author.description: Person or team submitting this request

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when request was submitted

description.description: Detailed description of the requested feature

acceptance_criteria.description: List of criteria that must be met for this feature to be considered complete

supersedes.description: Requirement ID that this feature request would replace

status.description: Current status of this feature request

approved_by.description: Person who approved this feature request

approved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when request was approved

rejected_reason.description: Reason for rejection if status is 'rejected'

testing_requirements.description: Additional testing requirements specific to this feature
